name: codex-session-delete
description: Find and permanently delete local Codex session JSONL files by exact session ID.

interface.shortDescription: Delete local Codex conversations by session ID.
interface.longDescription: Codex Session Delete locates local Codex session files under $CODEX_HOME/sessions or ~/.codex/sessions by exact session ID and removes the matching JSONL file.
interface.defaultPrompt: Delete a Codex session by ID.
